---
title: "Contact"
description-meta: "Get in touch with Daria Ardelean"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

The best way to reach me is by email.

- Institutional e-mail: [dariaalexia.ardelean@studenti.unipd.it](mailto:dariaalexia.ardelean@studenti.unipd.it)
- Address: Department of General Psychology, University of Padova, Via Venezia 8, 35131 Padova, Italy
